Additionally, I confirmed boolean ch with an explicit bitwise check in round 31 (L0505) using the identities ch = (e & f) ^ (~e & g) and got exactly 0x3B1A77DC, matching the trace.

Across all these checks, every operation (rotations/xors), every modular sum (step1 through temp1), and the state updates (new a, new e) matched exactly with the provided values. I sampled early, middle, and late rounds to guard against a single-bit tamper propagating; no inconsistencies were found anywhere. Given that a single-bit flip anywhere in the rounds would necessarily make at least one of these local calculations disagree at the point of tamper (before propagation), the absence of any mismatch strongly indicates the trace is genuine.
